seoTitle: How to Call From Zendesk Using Zendesk Talk
metaDescription: Learn how to call from Zendesk using the Talk console, pick outbound caller IDs, dial from ticket records, and log calls automatically.
intro: Copying phone numbers to an external device breaks the connection between a call and the customer's ticket history. Zendesk Talk lets agents place outbound calls directly through their browser and automatically logs the interaction. This guide walks through launching the dialer and calling straight from a ticket.

steps.heading: Launch the call console
steps.body: Click the call console phone icon in the upper navigation bar from any active admin screen.

steps.heading: Choose your caller ID
steps.body: Use the outbound line dropdown to select the brand phone number or region you want to call from.

steps.heading: Dial the number
steps.body: Use the digital keypad to input the recipient's complete destination number, or use click-to-call from a ticket.

steps.heading: Call from an existing ticket
steps.body: Open an active ticket and click the phone number link via the channel switcher to dial directly.

steps.heading: Start the call
steps.body: Click the green call button to launch the live audio stream through your headset connection.

steps.heading: Add follow-up notes
steps.body: Review the automatically generated ticket record and add internal follow-up call notes after the call ends.

faq.question: Do I need special hardware to make calls in Zendesk?
faq.answer: No, Zendesk Talk routes calls through your browser using WebRTC, though you can also connect a personal phone line if preferred.

faq.question: Does every call automatically create a ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, completed calls automatically build, attach, and populate a new or existing ticket record.

faq.question: Can I choose which number shows up as my caller ID?
faq.answer: Yes, the outbound line dropdown lets you match your caller ID to a specific brand or geographic region.

faq.question: Can I call a customer directly from their ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, click-to-call is available from within an open ticket using the channel switcher.
